message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1635","justification":"This study explicitly examines consumer behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1980, covering consumption patterns and attitudes of private households."},{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1981","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1636","justification":"Continuation of the German consumer behavior series, focusing on consumption and buying behavior in West Germany for the year 1981."},{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1637","justification":"Part of the longitudinal series on consumption; investigates consumer behavior of private households in West Germany in 1982."},{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1983","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1638","justification":"Annual survey on consumer and purchasing behavior of German households, providing detailed consumption data for 1983."},{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1639","justification":"Examines consumption and consumer decisions of West German households in 1984 as part of the recurring consumer behavior series."},{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1640","justification":"Survey dataset focused on consumption expenditures and consumer attitudes in West Germany for 1985."},{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1641","justification":"Provides micro data on consumer behavior, including expenditure structures and purchasing habits, for West Germany in 1986."},{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1987","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1642","justification":"Covers consumer behavior and consumption structure in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1987 within the established annual series."},{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1643","justification":"Documents consumption patterns, purchasing behavior, and related attitudes of German consumers in 1988."},{"title":"Consumer Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany 1989","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1644","justification":"Late-1980s wave of the German consumer behavior series, focusing on consumption and consumer decision‑making in 1989."}]}
